name: Greek Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 pounds boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the garlic powder, oregano, lemon juice, olive oil, chopped onion, and seasoned salt.
2. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken breasts and marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Melt the whipped margarine in a frying pan over medium heat.
5. Add the marinated chicken to the pan and sauté until it is tenderly cooked and evenly browned on both sides.
6. Remove the chicken from the pan and garnish with coarsely ground black pepper and tomato wedges before serving.
